required_trust_material: CA/trust policy for StartTLS or LDAPS
negative_fixture_requirements: invalid bind invalid TLS missing nested group excessive group depth
notes: Real QA must prove bind search group traversal and fail-closed behavior.

required_service_fixture: KDC realm with service principal and PAC-capable account
required_trust_material: keytab or credential cache trust configuration
negative_fixture_requirements: expired ticket wrong SPN bad PAC missing PAC
notes: Real QA must prove ticket validation and PAC/effective-group extraction.

negative_fixture_requirements: account denied session denied insecure prompt wrong module
notes: Unsupported only on hosts without PAM; closure requires supported-host evidence.

required_trust_material: shared secret and server identity policy
negative_fixture_requirements: access reject bad authenticator missing attributes timeout
notes: Real QA must prove Access-Request/Accept/Reject and authorization attributes.

negative_fixture_requirements: expired token alg none bad signature wrong audience overage groups
notes: Real QA must prove discovery JWKS signature audience expiry and group handling.

required_service_fixture: SAML IdP or signed assertion fixture
negative_fixture_requirements: expired assertion bad signature wrong audience malformed XML oversized attributes
notes: Real QA must prove XML signature audience time and attribute handling.

required_service_fixture: software authenticator or hardware-backed QA fixture
negative_fixture_requirements: wrong challenge wrong origin no user verification replayed assertion
notes: Host may skip hardware path only with recorded alternate fixture evidence.

required_trust_material: trust bundle and workload selector policy
negative_fixture_requirements: untrusted bundle expired SVID wrong SPIFFE trust domain missing service group
notes: Real QA must prove SVID/workload token validation and group materialization.

required_service_fixture: local CA and TLS client-auth fixture
required_trust_material: CA chain CRL/OCSP policy EKU/SAN policy
negative_fixture_requirements: revoked cert wrong EKU wrong SAN untrusted CA bad fingerprint
notes: Real QA must prove chain revocation EKU SAN fingerprint and binding checks.

required_trust_material: proxy signing key or trust anchor and allowed-source policy
negative_fixture_requirements: untrusted source bad signature replay expired assertion wrong audience
notes: Real QA must prove trusted source signature freshness audience and redaction.
